title: erigeron biolettii
intro: Erigeron biolettii, also known as the Santa Cruz daisy or coast erigeron, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Erigeron biolettii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Erigeron biolettii can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
